subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast turned thy face toward the Kingdom of the Most Glorious! Glad tidings to every steadfast one, blessed is every firm and resolute soul! By the life of the True One, verily the houris [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من توجه الی ملکوت الابهی بشری لکل ثابت طوبی لکل راسخ لعمر الحق ان حوریات
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
